data.name: Sex of Thrones 👑
data.detailed_description:
Sex of Thrones is an unabashedly explicit visual novel that transports you into a provocative world of sexual conquests and power struggles.



Dive into a realm where intimate encounters have the power to build empires or bring them crashing down. Engage with a variety of enticing characters, each offering their own explicit sexual adventures that could shape your reign or hasten your ruin.

Sex of Thrones showcases immersive 3D graphics where every detail of this tantalizing world is brought to life. The enticing character designs, a plot that brims with erotic intrigue, and a series of intense, explicit sexual encounters all come together to provide an unrivaled adult gaming experience.



In this game seduction is your weapon, and pleasure is your battleground. Navigate a world where alliances are as unstable as a lover's promise, and desire is the driving force behind every decision.

Features:
  • Diverse and Alluring Characters – Engage with a cast of uniquely attractive characters, each with their own tantalizing personalities.
  • Plenty of Lewd Scenes with Various Girls – Enjoy numerous explicit encounters with a variety of enticing characters.
  • Intriguing Side Quests: Discover hidden secrets, solve puzzles, and embark on side missions that offer valuable rewards and uncover additional layers of the game's lore and world-building.
  • Intuitive User Interface: Enjoy a user-friendly interface designed for seamless navigation and accessibility, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable gaming experience for players of all skill levels.
  • Dynamic Environments: Immerse yourself in vividly detailed environments that evolve over time, reflecting the consequences of your actions and the passage of days, weeks, and months within the game world.

data.short_description: Sex of Thrones is a boldly explicit 18+ Visual Novel. Dive into a realm where lust rules and power games shape destinies. Embrace intense, erotic journeys, forging your path through a world aflame with desire and cunning.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 阿拉伯文, 印尼語, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 繁體中文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
